name: ClassificationSchema
summary: The ClassificationSchema class represent schemas loaded in the model.

methods.name: <=>
methods.summary: The <=> method is used to compare two ClassificationSchema objects for sorting.
methods.remarks: The <=> method is used to compare two ClassificationSchema objects for sorting. The comparison is done based on the schema name.

params.name: schema2
params.doc: The second schema in the comparison.

returns.doc: Integer - -1 if schema1 is less then schema2. 1 if schema1 is greater than schema2, 0 if the schemas are equal.

methods.name: name
methods.summary: The name method returns the name of the schema.
methods.remarks: The name method returns the name of the schema.

methods.name: namespace
methods.summary: The namespace method returns the namespace of the schema.
methods.remarks: The namespace method returns the namespace of the schema.
